roa.docketEntryComment: /X:THIS MATTER WAS HEARD BEFORE THE HONORABLE JUDGE CHAN/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/ORNAS/CTORD:ALI RIKER FROM THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT SHALL BE NOTIFIED IMMEDIATELY UPON DEFENDANT'S RELASE IN ORDER TO ENSURE TRANSPORTATION TO THE LATINO COMMISSION RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/ /X:THE PEOPLE ORALLY AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 008, A VIOLATION OF PENAL CODESECTION 459 IN THE SECOND DEGREE, A FELONY/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERSWVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:008/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:10-29-20/PPRF/REMA/CONTD:SENTENCING/DOP/

/CAL: POSSIBLE DISPO (PRE-PX M20)/DAWT/30    CACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT FOR TRANSPORT TO LATINO COMMISSION,/CONTD: POSSIBLE DISPO AND ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT IN M20/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/ACM/STWPX/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITHALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/WEAP/X: HOME DETENTION/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/CON:MURRAY SIZHOLZ/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DENOF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:03-30-20/987,2/BAIL:25,000/X:PEOPLE ORAL MOTION TO DETAIN NO BAILDENIED WITHOUGH PREJUDICE/SAORD/SA1:THERESE MYZWINDKI/SAORD2/SAORD/SA2:90 PINEHURST WAY, SF/SAORD3/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL: DISMISSAL DUE TO DEATH OF DEFENDANT/DEFT DECEASED/NP/BWR:10-29-20/BWR1/MO PC 1385/
/CAL:POSSIBLE DISPO & ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT RE TRANSPORT TO LATINO COMMISSION/INTC/CONTD:TO SET PX/DOP/
/CAL:PTC/DAWT/X:ALSO PRESENT VIA ZOOM, IS HAYLEY UPSHAW FROM THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE,/CONT/DOPC/
/CAL:TS PRELIMINARY HEARING/TN:EDUARDO JOSUE PAVONALVAREZ/INTC/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/INTC/CONTD: TO SET IN DEPT 20/DOP/
/CAL: STATUS OF M99 20004868 AND 20004869/INTC/NB/X: FUTURE DATE IS CONFIRMED/DOP/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/CONTD: STATUS OF M99/DOP/
